name: Battle Master
description: Battle Masters are students of the art of battle, learning martial techniques passed down through generations.

Combat Superiority.description: You learn maneuvers that are fueled by special dice called Superiority Dice. You learn three maneuvers of your choice. You have four Superiority Dice (d8s). A Superiority Die is expended when you use it. You regain all expended Superiority Dice when you finish a Short or Long Rest. You gain additional Superiority Dice at levels 7 and 15. If a maneuver requires a saving throw, the DC equals 8 + your Strength or Dexterity modifier (your choice) + Proficiency Bonus.

3.Student of War: You gain proficiency with one type of Artisan's Tools of your choice, and you gain proficiency in one skill of your choice from the skills available to Fighters at level 1.

7.Know Your Enemy: As a Bonus Action, you can discern certain strengths and weaknesses of a creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself; you know whether that creature has any Immunities, Resistances, or Vulnerabilities, and if the creature has any, you know what they are. Once per Long Rest. You can also restore a use by expending one Superiority Die (no action required).

10.Improved Combat Superiority: Your Superiority Die becomes a d10.

15.Relentless: Once per turn, when you use a maneuver, you can roll 1d8 and use the number rolled instead of expending a Superiority Die.

18.Ultimate Combat Superiority: Your Superiority Die becomes a d12.
